scripts.dogfood: pnpm --filter pinnedai build && node apps/cli/dist/cli.js check --description "$(cat .dogfood-claims.md 2>/dev/null)" && node apps/cli/dist/cli.js scan-diff --base HEAD
scripts.audit:features:cli: pnpm --filter pinnedai build && ./apps/cli/node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config audit/vitest.config.ts audit/features
scripts.audit:features:sticky: pnpm --filter pinnedai build && ./apps/cli/node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config audit/vitest.config.ts audit/sticky
scripts.audit:oss-sweep: pnpm --filter pinnedai build && ./apps/cli/node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config audit/vitest.config.ts audit/oss-sweep
